briefdescription.para: Return a Catalog view bound to the catalog's default session.

detaileddescription.para: Implementations may cache and return the same default catalog view on repeated calls.

briefdescription.para: Return a Catalog view bound to the supplied session context.

detaileddescription.para: Implementations should reject invalid contexts, such as an empty SessionContext::session_id. Returned catalog views use the normal Catalog interface for all table and namespace operations.

memberdef.argsstring: (RestCatalogProperties config, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > file_io, std::unique_ptr< HttpClient > client, std::unique_ptr< ResourcePaths > paths, std::unordered_set< Endpoint > endpoints, std::unique_ptr< auth::AuthManager > auth_manager, std::shared_ptr< auth::AuthSession > catalog_session, SnapshotMode snapshot_mode, SessionContext default_context)
memberdef.name: RestCatalog

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &table_config, std::shared_ptr< auth::AuthSession > contextual_session)
memberdef.name: TableAuthSession

memberdef.argsstring: (const SessionContext &context, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &table_config, const std::vector< StorageCredential > &storage_credentials) const
memberdef.name: TableFileIO

memberdef.argsstring: (const Namespace &ns, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &properties, auth::AuthSession &session)
memberdef.name: CreateNamespace

memberdef.argsstring: (const Namespace &ns, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &updates, const std::unordered_set< std::string > &removals, auth::AuthSession &session)
memberdef.name: UpdateNamespaceProperties

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const std::shared_ptr< PartitionSpec > &spec, const std::shared_ptr< SortOrder > &order, const std::string &location, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &properties, const SessionContext &context, std::shared_ptr< auth::AuthSession > contextual_session)

memberdef.name: UpdateTable

memberdef.name: StageCreateTable

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, const std::string &metadata_file_location, const SessionContext &context, std::shared_ptr< auth::AuthSession > contextual_session)

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, CommitTableResponse response, const SessionContext &context, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &table_config, std::shared_ptr< auth::AuthSession > table_session, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > table_io)
memberdef.name: MakeTableFromCommitResponse
